feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Remove SOAP envelope and namespace prefix using XSLT mapping in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Sapians,

Sometimes, we encountered an issue where CPI is getting data from SOAP sender channel which have SOAP envelope and namespace prefix in it and we face issue while processing that. Especially if we need to route the flow as per the condition. In that case, we need to read the value coming in SOAP fields and process further. The XML condition of router will not get processed until the SOAP envelope and namespace prefix are removed.

To resolve this issue, we can use XSLT mapping which can remove the entire SOAP envelope and namespace prefix to process further in SAP CPI.

Sample SOAP payload :

<?xml version="1.0"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" soap:encodingStyle="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-encoding">
<soap:Body>
<m:GetPrice xmlns:m="https://www.w3schools.com/prices">
<m:Item>Apples</m:Item>
<m:Price>110</m:Price>
</m:GetPrice>
</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

XSLT mapping to remove namespace and prefix.

<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:output method="xml" omit-xml-declaration="yes" />
<xsl:template match="/|comment()|processing-instruction()">
<xsl:copy>
<xsl:apply-templates />
</xsl:copy>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="*">
<xsl:element name="{local-name()}">
<xsl:apply-templates select="@*|node()" />
</xsl:element>
</xsl:template>
<xsl:template match="@*">
<xsl:attribute name="{local-name()}">
<xsl:value-of select="." />
</xsl:attribute>
</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

Output payload :

 

<Envelope encodingStyle="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-encoding">
    <Body>
        <GetPrice>
            <Item>Apples</Item>
            <Price>110</Price>
        </GetPrice>
    </Body>
</Envelope>
 

This conclude the blog😊, with this the SOAP envelope and namespace prefix will be removed in SAP CPI.

In case of any queries, please comment down. Will try to resolve your concerns😊.

entry.title: Message Processing Log APIs for SAP API Management?
entry.content:
Hi there,

I was looking for a way to extract API logs in API Management  in order to forward them to external System like we do forCloud Integration  iFlows using MPL APIs. I am referring to this: API Reference | Message Processing Logs | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

I could see we can create Custom Dashboards for API monitoring, but I can't find anything that could tell me that the API logs (success/failures with details) can be forwarded like SAP CI.

Analyze API Proxies | SAP Help Portal

Thanks for your help.

-Anuj

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite - Message Mapping - addContextChange in UDF is ignored
entry.content:
Hi expterts,

I am trying to merge several single values into one structure using an UDF with the addContextChange function.
Unfortunately it does not work as expected. 

My source structure look similar to this all with occurence 0..1:
[...]
costCenter1 
costCenter2
costCenter3
percentage1
percantage2
percentage3
[...]

Inside the target message I would like to group them in a structure like this:
[...]
costDistribution (0..*)
- costCenter (1..1)
- percentage (1..1)
[...]

To map the values I am using an UDF function:
def void costDistribution(String[] costCenter1, String[] costCenter2, String[] costCenter3, String[] percentage1, String[] percentage2, String[] percentage3, Output parentNode, Output costCenters, Output percentages, MappingContext context){ ... }

For test purposes I tried this with static values to get a feeling for the context change function and tried this:
parentNode.addValue("004025235")
costCenters.addValue("004025235")
percentages.addValue("80")

parentNode.addContextChange()
costCenters.addContextChange()
percentages.addContextChange()

parentNode.addValue("004025240")
costCenters.addValue("004025240")
percentages.addValue("20")

My expection in the target would be to have several costDistribution nodes with the corresponding values like this:
[...]
costDistribution
- costCenter 004025235
- percentage 80
costDistribution
- costCenter004025240
- percentage 20
[...]

In Reality the first block is generated. May someone explain me how I need to use the contextChange function to achieve the wanted structure?
Thank you all in advance.

Best regards

entry.title: Unable to pass the Exchange property from one Iflow to anothe IFlow Process Direct in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi , 

I am trying to pass the Exchange property from one iflow to other. I tried in below procedure. 

source iflow: 

set property 

mapped the property to header 

Target iflow: 

get property using $:header.headername}

i am able to see the header in source iflow , but the same value is not populating in the target iflow. 

I checked few blogs and tried in simple way but no luck. 

Please do the needful. 

Regards , 

Giridhar

entry.title: Client certificate authentication for CPI to OnPrem HTTPS connection scenario
entry.content:
Hi

I have a requirement where I need to authenticate with an on-prem system using client certificates for the HTTPS receiver adapter.

HTTPS receiver adapter does not support client certificate authentication for proxy type on-prem.

How can I handle this requirement.

Regards,

Dileep S

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite - don't see API Business Hub Enterprise. Trial "P" account
entry.content:
I have a trial P type account.  I'm on section 3 - 7 of the learning journey "developing with SAP Integration Suite".  I don't see API Business Hub Enterprise.  I added 3 roles today (AuthGroup.API.Admin, AuthGroup.API.ApplicationDeveloper, AuthGroup.APIPortalRegistration). 

Is it a timing issue and I will see later OR is it not available with a trail account?  It appears you should be able to get to by going to "SAP integration Suite" and clicking on the 9 dot applications icon on the upper right.  I see SAP Business Accelerator Hub, SAP BTP Cockpit, API Management Client SDK, Develop Hub, and Graph Navigator.  I dont' see "API Business Hub Enterpise".  I was trying to do the Engage, Create, ... to create a product.  When I go to publish, it doesn't work and doesn't give any reason.  I think it is because I can't get to API business hub enterprise.  Clues?

entry.title: BTP Integration Suite_Service Contract screen IF error message
entry.content:
Hi Expert！

Service Contract information is linked to other peripheral systems using BTP Integration Suite.
When a Service Contract is created, BTP will be launched and data will be converted and integrated.

【Requirements】
When you press the "Save" button on the S/4HANA Cloud Service Contract, it is expected that IF integration will begin.
If an error occurs during IF integration, is it possible to display something like an error message on the Service Contract screen?

Soma

entry.title: Event Notification Subscription
entry.content:
I am integrating with the sap successfactors RCM and I want to use assessment vendors
So what I am doing is I am adding assessment vendors from Manage Assessment Vendors and than I am adding in provisioning Import/Export Assessment Vendor Packages and adding assessment csv 
and than I am subscribing in Event Notification subscription with the endpoint url 
here 

The endpoint url is the webhook that i have created and it is being able to save.
But When I create the Job requisition and add Assessment Assciation some thing like this

By adding this and create a Job requisition and than invite the candidate and move it to the stage that the Assessment Assciation is set up in like this

it should trigger the event that we have subscribed to but it is not triggering the event and I am not recieving the event value so can you please guide If I am missing something 
and tell me how to do the assessment integration It would be really helpful.

entry.title: How to divide XML message records (node) wise and post it one by one to a REST API using SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a scenario in SAP Cloud Integration (CPI) where I'm fetching project data from SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) using an OData call. The response XML contains multiple <entry> records, each representing a project.

<feed xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom" xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices" xml:base="https://my******-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/">
    <id>https://-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API</id>
    <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API</title>
    <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
    <author>
        <name/>
    </author>
    <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_API"/>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Adaptive 26/11 Prd Dev</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>E-91-ARA-PRD-2611</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2024-12-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2052-04-16T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>9150A30000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>2000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>9150A30000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Created</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000001</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>User A</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>33382281-a32f-1eef-b4b5-3d515802dbb0</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Customized Engineering with BMW</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>E-49-ENG-BMW-25</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2023-04-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2026-12-31T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>4960A00001</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>1000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>4960A00001</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Released</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000011</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>Aakanksha</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>1000023</d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-b7a8-9f7fe6c49bb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Adaptive 26/11 Prd Dev</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>E-91-ARA-PRD-2611</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2024-12-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2052-04-16T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>9150A30000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>2000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>9150A10000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Created</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000001</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>User 2</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-b79e-66c149a8dbb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Developer Classic 2011</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>C-49-DEV-ARC-PRD-2011</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2024-03-31T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2099-12-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>4950A50000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>1000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>4950A50000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Released</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000011</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>Aakanksha</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
    <entry>
        <id>https://my*****-api.s4hana.cloud.sap/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS/YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')</id>
        <title type="text">YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')</title>
        <updated>2025-04-07T05:59:03Z</updated>
        <category term="YY1_PROJECTDETAILS_API_CDS.YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType" scheme="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/scheme"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')" rel="self" title="YY1_ProjectDetails_APIType"/>
        <link href="YY1_ProjectDetails_API(guid'b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6')/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" rel="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/related/to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH" type="application/atom+xml;type=entry" title="to_YY1_IsSynced_PPH"/>
        <content type="application/xml">
            <m:properties xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata" xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices">
                <d:ProjectUUID>b702a842-56ed-1eef-bad3-7eb2630a7bb6</d:ProjectUUID>
                <d:ProjectDescription>Test Project</d:ProjectDescription>
                <d:Project>TESTPROJECT1</d:Project>
                <d:ProjectStartDate>2025-02-01T00:00:00</d:ProjectStartDate>
                <d:ProjectEndDate>2025-02-04T00:00:00</d:ProjectEndDate>
                <d:ProfitCenter>9150A10000</d:ProfitCenter>
                <d:CompanyCode>2000</d:CompanyCode>
                <d:ResponsibleCostCenter>9150A10000</d:ResponsibleCostCenter>
                <d:ProjectStatus>Released</d:ProjectStatus>
                <d:Person>9980000001</d:Person>
                <d:PersonFullName>User</d:PersonFullName>
                <d:ProjectRoleName>Project Financial Controller</d:ProjectRoleName>
                <d:YY1_Customer2_PPH></d:YY1_Customer2_PPH>
                <d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH></d:YY1_IsSynced_PPH>
            </m:properties>
        </content>
    </entry>
</feed>

The requirement is to send each project record individually to a third-party REST API (3rd Party HRMS), which only accepts one record per request in application/x-www-form-urlencoded format with the key name inputData.

I tried using Iterating Splitter, but I am not getting the expected behavior — it's not making separate HTTP calls or invoking the Request Reply as intended.

My goal is:

  • Fetch XML containing multiple projects

  • Split it into individual messages (each project)

  • Send one-by-one using a Request Reply step to the API

  • Handle and log each response if needed

    Any step-by-step help, example flow, or blog reference would be highly appreciated.

    Thanks in advance! 
    Best regards,
    Prathmesh Sutar

entry.title: SAP CPI Message Mapping – Filter and Align Business Partner names correctly per line item
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working in SAP Integration Suite on a transformation/message mapping scenario where I need to transform repeating lines into individual records in the target.

My Goal:

  • For each <LineItem>, select the correct BusinessPartner name in the correct order

  • The correct name can appear in either <Name1> or <Name2> depending on other logic.

  • If either value is equal to "CompanyX", it should be excluded

  • If names are null/empty, I want to output the string "Empty"

Example Input (Simplified):

<Document>
<MessageHeader>
<Header>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<Party>
<Buyer>
<Name1>CompanyX</Name1>
</Buyer>
<Seller>
<Name2>Company1</Name2>
</Seller>
</Party>
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<!-- No Party/Name elements -->
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

<LineItem>
<Linedetails>
<InvolvedParties>
<Party>
<Seller>
<Name1>Company2</Name1>
</Seller>
<Buyer>
<Name2>CompanyX</Name2>
</Buyer>
</Party>
</InvolvedParties>
</Linedetails>
</LineItem>

</Header>
</MessageHeader>
</Document>

NOTE: CompanyX should never be sent to the output.

The output i get:

<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company1</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company2</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Empty</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>

Expected Output:

<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company1</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Empty</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>
<NewLineItem>
<BusinessPartner>Company2</BusinessPartner>
</NewLineItem>

What I Tried:
- A Groovy UDF that takes in Name1, Name2, and a third "anchor" value to trigger per-row execution

Despite this, the output becomes misaligned: either names are skipped, appear in the wrong order, or "Empty" shows up at the wrong line.

What’s the best approach in CPI Message Mapping to:

  • Process each <LineItem> individually with the correct data in correct order? i.e. when fields are empty/null, it wont take the next available value to populate the field.

  • Ensure correct row alignment and output order

  • Return a default "Empty" if both names are excluded

Any help, especially from those working with multi-row mappings or filtering per record, would be really appreciated.

entry.title: Sequential Multicast suppressing error details
entry.content:
When an OData calls, after a multicast step (a single multicast step, not nested), the error details are suppressed when sending to Exception Handling.

i.e. OData Error

<error>

<code>SLS_LORD/033</code>

<message>The document is locked</message>

</error>

Error available in Exception Handling:

org.apache.camel.CamelExchangeException: Multicast processing failed for number 0. Exchange[55EE78BA9D8B2F2-0000000000000004]. Caused by: [com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.odata.exception.OsciException - Bad Request : 400 : HTTP/1.1 ]

 

How do we get to the OData error in our error handling? The normal Groovy script can only return the Camel error, which is the Multicast processing error. It can't retrieve the OData error

SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: SAP B1 integration framework scenario steps sequence
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to full fill below requirements in B1if v1 platform. Got some questions hope you can advice me.

I need get some records from database with sql query, let's call it "RecordsWO". Loop the "RecordsWO" and call B1 object to update. After all the objects are updated, get another records from database and call it "RecordsWeight". Loop the "RecordsWeight" and call B1 object to update them. After these I need call a SQL to update the job status.

At first, I created below scenario step. One main step to control the sequence, and two sub-steps to update the B1 objects. Of course, it won't work. Because you don't know when the sub-step all be finished after you put the update work into the B1i queues.

 

After that, I try to use the "call b1 object" atom instead of "call sub-step". In my opinion, this should works. You can loop the records and call b1 object to update. This is  synchronous execution. But during the test, the message keeps in processing and won't finish. It seems get stuck in queue and without any exception.

So do you have any ideas about this? or any good solution to make the steps sequence executed? really thanks!

#B1 #B1if

entry.title: PO to BTP - IS Migration : Query parameters in HTTP receiver adapter
entry.content:
Hello all,

I'm migrating an HTTP interface from PO to BTP-IS. Just wanted to know how the query parameters option in PO HTTP receiver can be implemented in HTTP receiver adapter in CPI.

Attaching the PO configuration screenshot for reference.

Thank you,

Aditya

entry.title: Error while trying to activate new SAP key
entry.content:
Hello,

I am facing some difficulties while activating a new SAP key in our Integration Suite.

I am trying to activate following key:

Unfortunately I receive an unspecificated error popup after klicking "active".

Is somebody facing the same issue, or did face it in past and has a solution?

 

Regards,
Steffen

entry.title: Event Mesh v.s. Cloud Integration - JMS Adapter
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

My understanding: To achieve asynchronous system integration, Event Mesh is often used. However, according to a blog, asynchronous integration can also be achieved without Event Mesh by using the JMS Adapter within Cloud Integration.

Questions:

  1. Is my understanding correct?
  2. If my understanding is correct, what are the advantages and disadvantages of using Event Mesh versus Cloud Integration - JMS Adapter?
  3. Are there specific use cases for Event Mesh versus Cloud Integration - JMS Adapter? Explanations with examples are appreciated. (when to use event mesh, and when to use JMS Adapter?)
  4. When subscribing Services in BTP Cockpit, Event Mesh must be registered separately from Integration Suite. Does this mean the costs are calculated separately?

Thank you.

entry.title: Choosing the Right Authorization Method in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm curious to know which authorization methods you prefer when working with the SAP Integration Suite, including OAuth, Basic Authentication, and Client Certificate Authentication. I've noticed that using Client Certificate Authentication can be more complex due to the need to update certificates with all communication partners every 365 days.

Given these considerations, do you have recommendations or best practices to share? Additionally, does SAP provide any guidance on preferred authorization methods for specific scenarios?

Looking forward to hearing your insights!

Thanks!

Kind regards,

Stefan

entry.title: Push data from a CSV file to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to know if it’s possible to push data from a CSV file into SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using SAP Integration Suite.

 My goal:
Automate the data load process from an external source (CSV format) into SAC, ideally into a planning model or a dataset.

 What I’ve done so far:

  • CSV file is available and accessible via SFTP.

  • I’ve set up a basic iFlow in Integration Suite to read the file.

  • I’m now trying to understand how to push that data into SAC—what endpoint or API to use? What format is expected by SAC?

  • Any sample iFlow, blog post, or documentation to guide the process?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: SAP CPI: Not able to pick done file
entry.content:
Using Sender SFTP, I am trying to pick the Main file based on Read lock strategy as Completion file.

 

Main file Naming Format: abc.TXT
Done/completion File Format: abc_CMPL.TXT

What should be the format of Done file Naming. Seems it only supports when extension is .done.

Please suggest

entry.title: Certficate expiry notification in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have received notification regarding the certificate expiry for Baltimore CyberTrust Root Certificate on 13th May 2025 in Integration Suite. We are not sure whether it really affects us,  There are certain steps that needs to be taken mentioned in https://me.sap.com/notes/3565626/E  . Eventhough this certificate is not used currently, it is better to update the certificate right? Pls guide regarding this.

 

 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Oracle DB TCPS Connection issue - Integration Suite
entry.content:
I am trying to connect to an On-Prem Oracle 19c DB in Integration Suite. 
Cloud Connector connectivity is fine.
I tried the following:
 
1. JDBC URL provided (Old style Full Address format):
This URL was provided in the JDBC Material, Oracle driver was also installed
 pod1234.test-testing.com is a virtual host
 
jdbc:oracle:thin:@(DESCRIPTION=(ADDRESS=(PROTOCOL=tcps)(HOST=pod1234.test-testing.com)(PORT=1539))(CONNECT_DATA=(SERVICE_NAME=TEST_ABC3)))
 
Outcome: fails with error com.sap.it.rt.adapter.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCException: Error while getting Datasource Service: ServiceReference is null
 
2. Tried EZCONNECT Style since I think Full Address format is not supported: 
a) jdbc:oracle:thin:@tcps:pod1234.test-testing.com:1539/TEST_ABC3?oracle.net.ssl_server_cert_dn="CN=pod1234a"
b) jdbc:oracle:thin:@tcps://pod1234.test-testing.com:1539/TEST_ABC3?oracle.net.ssl_server_cert_dn="CN=pod1234a"
 
Outcome: fails with the same error com.sap.it.rt.adapter.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCException: Error while getting Datasource Service: ServiceReference is null
 
The following URL worked fine: 
3. jdbc:oracle:thin:@pod1234.test-testing.com:1521/TEST_ABC3
but this is using the TCP protocol, and I want to connect using the TCPS protocol.
 
Please note that the cloud connector configuration is working fine; I don't think there is a problem here.
Additionally, I had also uploaded the certificate required for the TCPS connection SSL handshake in the Monitor > "Integration and APIs" > Keystore.
 
In the local system using DB Client DataGrip, I was able to connect using all the above URLs, but in Integration Suite, I am getting the error.
 
Please suggest what could be the issue.
